ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the weather data was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the weather data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the weather data was recorded */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the weather data was recorded */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power or intensity of the weather event (e.g., storm, hurricane) */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the weather data was recorded */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the weather data was recorded */,
  "pres" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  "wnd" INTEGER /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., weather station, satellite, radar) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location where the weather data was recorded */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the weather_stations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the weather station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, emergency management official) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the weather report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
